mapper.update:
UPDATE sync_task SET retry_times = retry_times + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_task_archive (id, order_type, sync_task_type, sync_system, source_order_code, task_status, retry_times, error_message, sync_success_time, original_create_time, original_update_time, archive_time) SELECT id, order_type, sync_task_type, sync_system, source_order_code, task_status, retry_times, error_message, sync_success_time, create_time, update_time, NOW() FROM sync_task WHERE task_status = 'SUCCESS' AND update_time < #{beforeTime}

INSERT INTO sync_task_archive (id, order_type, sync_task_type, sync_system, source_order_code, task_status, retry_times, error_message, sync_success_time, original_create_time, original_update_time, archive_time) SELECT id, order_type, sync_task_type, sync_system, source_order_code, task_status, retry_times, error_message, sync_success_time, create_time, update_time, NOW() FROM sync_task WHERE task_status = 'FAIL' AND update_time < #{beforeTime}
